subcodes.first_line: The Book proclaimeth the truth, would that ye but knew, that it hath been sent down from the presence of God, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting, and beareth tidings of [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نطق بالحق لو انتم تعرفون انه نزل من لدی الله المهیمن القیوم یبشر بما
